prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-JEWELLOUPE-10XALUM-TT-AMZ Product Type: MAGNIFIER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 10x Aluminum Jewelers Loupe 22mm Diameter Glass Lens Magnifier for Jewelry, Gems, Rocks, Coins, Stamps Hobby Tool Description: The ToolTreaux 10x Magnification Jewelers Loupe in rugged aluminum provides simple yet effective magnification designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupe features a black plastic body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may obstruct the view of the small items you're working with.

This loupe features a 10X magnification power and provides jewelers, watch makers or photographers the ability to pinpoint areas that need extra attention. The lens has a large diameter of 22mm making it an ideal size for small items like beads, jewels, rhinestones, sequins and other items that require precision.

This loupe is housed inside of a durable yet lightweight aluminum body, and measures just 1" tall so it can easily fit inside any craft box, hobby tool kit or supply drawer. This is a must-have magnifying tool for anyone who needs a better look at small items and details. Search Terms: jewelers loupe 10x magnification eye led illuminated magnifying magnifier aluminum scale watch making tools precision magnifiers metal hobby tool crafting arts 22mm 22 mm optical glass jewelry gems coins rocks stamps Features: - 10X MAGNIFICATION POWER - Loupe magnifies small objects by 10 | Ideal for jewelry makers, watch repairs and hobby crafters placing, setting and identifying tiny materials - ALUMINUM BODY - Durable yet lightweight aluminum body protects lens from scratches and fingerprints when not in use - 22MM DIAMETER LENS - Large lens is perfect size for viewing beads, gems, rhinestones, jewels, sequins and other materials requiring precision - COMPACT DESIGN - Loupe measures just 1.25" tall and 1.5" wide | Easily fits inside craft boxes, hobby tool kits, supply drawers or workshop storage - VERSATILE MAGNIFIER - Designed for for jewelry making but great for watchmaking and repair, photography, printing, dentistry, tattooing, biology/geology, coin collecting and more === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: 10X Magnification, 22Mm Optical Glass Lens, Jewelry Gems Coins Stamps, Compact Aluminum Body, Precision Crafting

openai.title_differentiation: Scratch Resistant Aluminum Body, 22Mm Glass Lens, 10X Detail View, Compact Portable Design, Jewelry Watch Repair
